description_long: This is a vibrantly decorated ceramic cup featuring a whimsical medieval motif. The exterior is adorned with a colorful illustration of a knight in armor riding a white horse, set against a background of bold red and yellow diagonal stripes. The handle is integrated into the design, also painted with the same lively colors and motifs. The cup's interior continues the red and yellow striped pattern, creating a visually striking contrast with the illustrated exterior. The surface appears hard and slightly matte, typical of hand-painted ceramics. There is no visible branding or text, but the cup's unique artwork makes it stand out as a decorative and functional piece.
description: A hand-painted ceramic cup with a medieval knight and horse motif, set against bold red and yellow stripes. The cup features a matching handle and a vibrant, decorative pattern inside and out.
description_view_0: This view highlights the cup's handle and the sweeping red and yellow stripes, with part of the knight and horse illustration visible.
description_view_1: The front view showcases the full illustration of the knight on horseback, with the handle partially visible to the right.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the handle and the continuation of the decorative pattern, with the knight's shield and polka-dotted cape in clear view.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back of the knight and horse illustration, with the red and yellow stripes wrapping around the cup.
